capabilities.summary: Project-aware frontend design quality rules and anti-pattern guidance.
capabilities.notes: Adapted into design-quality and the existing design skills while preserving local accessibility, evidence, and responsible-design authority.

capabilities.summary: Shape and build an interface through production verification.
capabilities.notes: Split across design-consultation, design-html, and the shared design-quality gate.

capabilities.summary: Define interface intent and constraints before implementation.
capabilities.notes: Adapted into design-consultation and plan-design-review without importing Impeccable's interaction transport.

capabilities.summary: Capture durable product and design context.
capabilities.notes: The local bridge uses PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md as optional project sources of truth and accepts existing equivalent docs.

capabilities.summary: Document tokens, components, principles, and exceptions in DESIGN.md.
capabilities.notes: Adopted as a concise schema with narrative and machine-readable evidence boundaries.

capabilities.summary: Extract reusable tokens and components from an existing interface.
capabilities.notes: Tracked for a later implementation tranche because safe component migration needs framework-specific tests.

capabilities.summary: Combine visual judgment, deterministic evidence, severity, and persisted follow-through.
capabilities.notes: Adapted into a two-pass critique contract that uses independent subagents only when the user authorizes them.

capabilities.summary: Run technical UI checks across accessibility, responsiveness, performance, and anti-patterns.
capabilities.notes: The bridge uses the Impeccable detector when installed and reports a clear manual fallback when unavailable.

capabilities.summary: Apply a final design-system and shipping-readiness pass.
capabilities.notes: Integrated into design-review and design-html close-out instead of adding a duplicate local command.

capabilities.summary: Amplify a visually safe or bland interface.
capabilities.notes: Use the upstream command when installed; local design-shotgun remains the broader direction-exploration fallback.

capabilities.summary: Reduce visual aggression and overstimulation.
capabilities.notes: Use the upstream command when installed; local design-review handles prioritized fallback recommendations.

capabilities.summary: Remove unnecessary interface complexity.
capabilities.notes: Tracked as an upstream execution command with plan-design-review as the local planning fallback.

capabilities.summary: Verify overflow, errors, internationalization, accessibility resilience, and edge cases.
capabilities.notes: Integrated into the shared quality gate, design-html, accessibility-review, and QA routing.

capabilities.summary: Design first-run, feature-discovery, help, and empty-state experiences.
capabilities.notes: Current local coverage is distributed across plan-design-review and design-review; a dedicated command remains unadopted.

capabilities.summary: Add purposeful, accessible motion.
capabilities.notes: Use upstream for specialized execution; local quality gates enforce reduced motion and content visibility.

capabilities.summary: Introduce a deliberate and accessible color strategy.
capabilities.notes: Use upstream for specialized execution; local design-consultation owns overall system direction.

capabilities.summary: Improve typography hierarchy and readability.
capabilities.notes: Use upstream for specialized execution; local review and quality gates preserve typography checks.

capabilities.summary: Improve spacing, rhythm, composition, and hierarchy.
capabilities.notes: Use upstream for specialized execution; local design-review remains the general fallback.

capabilities.summary: Add context-appropriate personality and memorable details.
capabilities.notes: Tracked for future evaluation because delight choices need product evidence and responsible-design checks.

capabilities.summary: Create technically ambitious visual effects with progressive enhancement.
capabilities.notes: Kept upstream because its runtime and performance surface is specialized and fast-moving.

capabilities.summary: Improve interface labels, errors, instructions, and recovery copy.
capabilities.notes: Editorial guard and design review provide partial local coverage; a dedicated UX-writing workflow remains unadopted.

capabilities.summary: Adapt interfaces across viewport, input, orientation, and native platform constraints.
capabilities.notes: Integrated into design-html, accessibility-review, iOS design review, and the shared quality gate.

capabilities.summary: Diagnose and improve frontend performance.
capabilities.notes: QA and design-html cover verification; a design-specific performance command remains upstream.

capabilities.summary: Select browser elements, generate variants, steer, accept, and write to source.
capabilities.notes: The local skills may invoke this capability when Impeccable is installed. The browser server and source-rewrite runtime remain upstream.

capabilities.summary: Run deterministic UI checks manually, in CI, or after edits.
capabilities.notes: The detector and provider-native hooks remain Apache-licensed upstream runtime. Local skills define optional invocation and fallback behavior.

capabilities.summary: Compile one source skill into provider-specific packages.
capabilities.notes: Tracked as product architecture. This Codex-native port has no current need to vendor the multi-provider build system.

capabilities.summary: Test registry, routing, context loading, path classification, and fallback behavior.
capabilities.notes: The local package adopts deterministic conformance tests now; model-backed skill behavior tests remain a later tranche.
